# AirAgro - Професионални Агро Дрон Услуги в България

> AirAgro provides professional agricultural drone services across Bulgaria using DJI Agras T50 with RTK precision.

## About

AirAgro is a Bulgarian agricultural technology company specializing in drone-based crop protection and seeding services. We operate DJI Agras T50 drones equipped with RTK (Real-Time Kinematic) positioning for ±10 cm accuracy. With over 25,000 decares of experience and 47+ satisfied clients, we serve farmers across all regions of Bulgaria. The website is bilingual: Bulgarian pages live under /bg and English pages under /en.

## Services

- **Drone Spraying** (Пръскане с дрон): Insecticides, herbicides, fungicides, and foliar fertilization with 30-40% savings on chemicals. Capacity: up to 200 decares/hour (20 ha/hour).
- **Drone Seeding** (Засяване с дрон): Meadow rehabilitation, slope reinforcement, biological recultivation, and hydroseeding. Access to inaccessible terrains up to 45° slope.
- **Greenhouse Shading** (Засенчване на оранжерии): Drone application of shading paint (e.g. ReduSol/ReduHeat) onto greenhouse roofs. Lowers average greenhouse temperature by up to 5°C, no scaffolding or manual labour. Coverage up to 10,000 m²/hour.

## Key Facts

- Location: Bulgaria (nationwide coverage)
- Drone: DJI Agras T50 with RTK
- Precision: ±10 cm GPS accuracy
- Experience: 25,000+ decares treated
- Clients: 47+ satisfied customers
- Rating: 4.9/5.0 (47 reviews)
- Response time: 24-48 hours
- Working hours: 06:00-20:00, 7 days/week
